title: Batman Begins
description: A young Bruce Wayne trains to fight crime and returns to Gotham to become Batman.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who spreads chaos across Gotham City.

title: The Dark Knight Rises
description: Batman returns from retirement to stop Bane and save Gotham from destruction.

title: Joker
description: A troubled comedian descends into madness and becomes the infamous Joker.

title: Man of Steel
description: Clark Kent embraces his destiny as Superman while Earth faces a powerful alien threat.

title: Wonder Woman
description: An Amazon warrior leaves her island home to help end a world war.

title: Justice League
description: Batman and Wonder Woman assemble a team of heroes to defend Earth.

title: Iron Man
description: A billionaire engineer builds a powered suit and becomes the superhero Iron Man.

title: Iron Man 2
description: Tony Stark faces pressure from the government and a new technological enemy.

title: The Avengers
description: Earth's mightiest heroes unite to stop Loki and an alien invasion.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers make a final stand to reverse a devastating loss and save the universe.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
description: Peter Parker balances teenage life with his new role as Spider-Man.

title: Doctor Strange
description: A talented surgeon learns mystic arts after a life-changing accident.

title: Black Panther
description: The new king of Wakanda must defend his nation and claim his rightful place.

title: Thor
description: The arrogant god Thor is cast out of Asgard and learns humility on Earth.

title: Captain America: The First Avenger
description: A determined soldier becomes Captain America during World War II.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
description: A group of unlikely heroes band together to stop a cosmic threat.

title: Interstellar
description: A team travels through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity.

title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and plant ideas.

title: The Martian
description: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and determination to survive.
